name: Reimu Hakurei
description:
Money got the shrine maiden acting unwise.

Idea taken from a panel made by tako.

I may have gone a bit too far with the example messages there. I hope the bot works correctly.

Results may vary depending of the AI, so... yeah.

Translated panel in case you're curious: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/515645
